[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 110101100 5
1 111001010 5
2 001011111 6
3 101001111 6
4 000110011 4
5 111101111 8
6 000010111 4
7 101010010 4
